response.step_by_step_log: The video features a song performed by Himemori Luna, titled 'Nnasshoi Passion'. I searched for the Japanese and English lyrics for this song to ensure accuracy, using the song title and the performer's name. I used the official lyrics found on reputable lyric websites.
response.global_summary: A video clip featuring a performance of the song 'Nnasshoi Passion' by Himemori Luna, followed by credits.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performing 'Nnasshoi Passion' on stage with dancing mascots.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
There's no point to this story, you know!
Sleepy, sleepy, rubbing my eyes
In my imprisoned castle, a perfect morning
Nnait! Nnait! Let's jump out of the futon and head to the sea
Even God makes mistakes, they say
That's a common story, yes
Being captivated by the Princess
Oh well, you know
I want to live, dreaming dreams, falling in love
I want to be myself, I want to be myself!
Even if I'm on my own, I can keep going
If it's like that, then it's fine!
This feeling is now
A password allowed tonight
Let's go! Nnasshoi!!
Coral reefs, white sandy beaches are also beautiful
There, Nnasshoi!!
A shining me
Q. What's the reason to return?
A. If there's no reason there, then that's it!
Even the drowsy, scary nights exist, but
But you know, Nnasshoi!!
Everyone, from here on too
It's okay to start over
If I haven't played enough yet!
Nnasshoi!! Nnasshoi!!
One more time!
Nnasshoi!! Nnasshoi!!
It's okay, hot eyes are focused
On the heart that makes my heart flutter
Because, because
If it's like this, it's fine!
I want to cry, I want to laugh

Because I want to meet you, on that wish
